memberdef.argsstring: (u32 *BufferPtr, u16 Wtx, u16 Wbc, u16 Rtx, u16 Rbc)
memberdef.name: ApmCheck

briefdescription.para: Checks the metrics passed to this function are same as collected by APM.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to buffer containing captured metrics.
is Write transaction count value to be checked.
is Write byte count value to be checked.
is Read transaction count value to be checked.
is Read byte count value to be checked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if metrics passed are equal to metrics collected by APM.
XST_FAILURE if any of the metrics passed is not equal to metrics collected by APM.

briefdescription.para: Generates write and read transcations to OCM and reads metrics captured by APM.

memberdef.argsstring: (XAxiPmon *InstancePtr, u8 slot, u8 Metric1, u8 Metric2)
memberdef.name: ApmMetricConfig

briefdescription.para: Sets Counter 0 and Counter 1 for collecting the passed metrics.

parameterdescription.para: is Metric to be captured by Counter 1
is Metric to be captured by Counter 2

briefdescription.para: Reads metrics from APM counters to buffer.
Main function that invokes the example in this file.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the example has completed successfully.
XST_FAILURE if the example has failed.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example showing how to use the driver APIs of the AXI Performance Monitor driver to measure the following metrics captured at OCM of Zynq MP:

para.verbatim: - Write Transcation Count - Write Byte Count - Read Transcation Count - Read Byte Count

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a bss 04/01/15 First release 6.5 sg 11/02/16 Updated device ID to OCM PSU APM ID ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. 6.10 ht 06/23/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 6.14 vlt 01/27/26 Fixed codespell issues
